wordplay_note: A foxy woman — seductive and ambiguous
card_description: Linda Fox (meaning "Fox = cunning/beautiful animal") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Divine Invasion*. Famous singer whose music is either divine or a trap set by Belial. Name note: A foxy woman — seductive and ambiguous. Art as battleground between divine inspiration and demonic seduction. First appears in *The Divine Invasion*.

reference.brief: Famous singer whose music is either divine or a trap set by Belial
reference.significance: Art as battleground between divine inspiration and demonic seduction
